metadata.description: Official Claude Code skills for ZenMux

plugins.name: zenmux-product
plugins.description: ZenMux product knowledge and onboarding — answers questions about features, API, integration, pricing, and best practices from official docs, and interactively guides tool/SDK configuration step by step

plugins.name: zenmux-management
plugins.description: ZenMux account management tools — query real-time subscription detail, quota usage, PAYG balance, Flow rate, and per-generation cost via the Management API

plugins.name: zenmux-feedback
plugins.description: Submit GitHub issues, feature requests, bug reports, product suggestions, and feedback to ZenMux — gathers info conversationally and submits via gh CLI
